title: cotyledon umbilicus-veneris var. deflexa
intro: Cotyledon umbilicus-veneris var. deflexa, also known as the Venus's leaf or love plant, is a rare, succulent plant species that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. Historically, it has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits are believed to include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, Cotyledon umbilicus-veneris var. deflexa can be found in infusions, decoctions, or salves, and it is often used in traditional folk medicine for its potential therapeutic effects.
